name: autonomous
description: Autonomous agent profile: all hooks active, warnings instead of blocks. Agents continue working and escalate only when they need a human decision.
use_case: Daily driver for autonomous agents, multi-agent workflows, unattended operation
notes: Designed for autonomous workflows. All safety hooks fire but none block execution — they log warnings to guard-blocks.jsonl instead. The agent keeps working and escalates to the user only when it genuinely needs a decision. Use openclaw-guard to review what was flagged.
